news.headline: Ukraine’s President Zelenskiy's appearance at the Hudson Institute in Washington is canceled - Hudson Executive VP.
Brent Crude futures settle at $73.18/bbl, down 86 cents, 1.16%.
Canadian Gold Resources (TSXV: CAN) ends investor relations deal with Alliance Advisors, updates stock options grants, and focuses on gold exploration.
news.summary: Canadian Gold (TSXV: CAN) terminates its investor relations agreement with Alliance Advisors. The firm also revises its stock options grants. Canadian Gold continues its primary focus on gold exploration.

news.headline: Rocket Lab USA reports $132.39 million revenue, but stock struggles, forecasting $117-123 million revenue, raising concerns.
news.summary: Rocket Lab USA Inc. (NASDAQ:RKLB) is a top player in the space economy with strong first-quarter sales of $132.39 million, beating estimates, but their stock has been declining. The CEO introduced Flatellite, a low-cost satellite for large constellations with implications for various industries. However, the market response was lackluster due to the first-quarter revenue guidance of $117-123 million falling short of the $135.67 million consensus view. This drew attention to RKLB's high sales multiple of nearly 27 times TTM revenue, leading to concerns about its valuation compared to previous periods. Full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: CYBEX recalls Aton G car seats made before May 10, 2024 due to safety concerns. Company committed to helping parents.
news.summary: Leading manufacturer and marketer of infant and juvenile products, CYBEX, based in Boston, announced today the initiation of a voluntary safety recall (NHTSA 25C002) of specific units of CYBEX Aton G infant car seats. The company is emphasizing its commitment to safety and assisting parents in addressing the affected units.

news.headline: Healthcare Realty Trust joins Citi's 2025 conference, updates investors. Event on March 3-4, with new presentation online.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, Healthcare Realty Trust Incorporated (NYSE:HR) based in Nashville, Tennessee, revealed its participation in Citi’s 2025 Global Property CEO Conference scheduled for March 3-4, 2025. The Company’s management team will attend this event. Healthcare Realty also shared that they have released an updated investor presentation ahead of the conference and other forthcoming investor gatherings. Interested individuals can access the presentation on the Investor Relations page of the company’s website at https://investors.healthcarerealty.com/corporate-profile/.

news.headline: Easy Ice acquires Carefree Ice in Erie, CO, their 2nd acquisition of 2025, expanding Colorado presence.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona on February 28, 2025, Easy Ice made another significant acquisition in Colorado. This marks their second purchase of the year as they take over the operations of Carefree Ice, LLC located in Erie, CO. Founded in 2012, Carefree Ice is known for its exceptional...

news.headline: France prohibits PFAS in multiple products except cookware, due to industry pushback. Tefal employees protested against the ban.
news.summary: In France, a recent ban on persistent chemicals has been modified to permit their utilization in nonstick pans following resistance from the industry. This decision came after employees of Tefal, a renowned cookware manufacturer, held a protest against the ban. The adjusted regulation now allows the continued use of these chemicals in nonstick cookware.

news.headline: 'Economic Blackout' organizer jailed for sex charge; Ex-offender John Schwarz led viral boycott campaign #news #USA
news.summary: Before garnering attention for orchestrating a successful shopping boycott that spread widely online, John Schwarz had a past where he was listed as a sex offender. This was due to his admission of guilt in a case involving the dissemination of voyeuristic material, causing his inclusion in the registry.

news.headline: DIAGNOS to amend $590,000 convertible debentures. Leader in health AI.
news.summary: BROSSARD, Quebec - February 28, 2025 - Diagnos Inc., a leading company in early health issue detection through advanced Artificial Intelligence (AI), plans to modify the conditions of $590,000 in unsecured convertible debentures (each a “Debenture”) issued in a private placement of units initially revealed on March 1, 2022. The Corporation is listed as DIAGNOS on the TSX Venture exchange under the symbol ADK, on the OTCQB under DGNOF, and on the FWB under 4D4A.

news.headline: NYMEX WTI Crude April futures settle at $69.76 a barrel, down 59 cents, 0.84%.
NYMEX Gasoline March futures settle at $1.9703 a gallon.
NYMEX Diesel March futures settle at $2.3549 a gallon.
Trump made the decision to call off the signing ceremony with Zelenskiy - White House Official.
NYMEX Natural Gas April futures settle at $3.8340/MMBtu.
Kaldvik AS finalizes deals to purchase crucial assets in fish farming on Iceland's east coast.
Zelenskiy's Aide Yermak: Without guarantees, the war will return.
Russian Foreign Ministry Spokeswoman on Zelenskiy at the White House: How Trump and Vance restrained themselves and didn't hit him is a miracle of restraint.
Ukraine’s President Zelenskiy: Thank you America for your support. Ukraine needs just and lasting peace. We are working exactly for that kind of peace.
Dollar dips due to Fed's stance on inflation, JPMorgan says downtrend slowing. Yen rally may not last. 75% of dollar buying post-October unwound.
news.summary: JPMorgan analyst Meera Chandan suggests that the recent decline in the U.S. dollar is more attributed to the Federal Reserve's lack of concern towards increasing inflation expectations rather than trade issues. The decrease in U.S. real yields, due to the Fed's passive stance, has led to the dollar's drop. Chandan predicts that the de-risking trend is losing momentum, with around 75% of the dollar's gains since October being reversed. Additionally, amid a significant decrease in U.S. services, economists are highlighting concerns over high prices and uncertainty. Despite the yen's recent strength, Chandan cautions that this rally may not last long. The Bank of Japan's policy changes could potentially act as obstacles to the yen's continued rise.

news.headline: Amphastar's Q4 earnings miss expectations with 92 cents EPS vs 94 cents consensus, $186.5M sales vs $188.81M consensus.
news.summary: Amphastar Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ:AMPH) released their fourth-quarter report, revealing an adjusted EPS of 92 cents, up from the previous year's 88 cents, but falling short of the estimated 94 cents. Specializing in generic and proprietary injectable, inhalation, and intranasal products, the company reported sales of $186.5 million, marking a 20% increase from the previous year but missing the expected $188.81 million. Jack Zhang, President and CEO of the company, expressed pride in surpassing the $100 million annual sales goal for Primatene MIST in 2024 and looks forward to expanding the brand further. Details on the report can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: MetaMask to include Solana & Bitcoin in addition to Ethereum in its wallet, as previously reported. Stay tuned for details.
news.summary: MetaMask, a popular cryptocurrency wallet, is set to expand its offerings beyond Ethereum to include not only Bitcoin, as reported previously, but also Solana. This significant development will provide users with access to a wider range of cryptocurrencies. Keep an eye on MetaMask as they make this transition.

news.headline: The Life You Can Save and Educate Girls are partnering to educate 7,500 girls in India through a $300,000 matched-funding campaign for International Women's Day.
news.summary: A fundraising initiative is underway to collect $300,000 to back girls' education in India, empowering them with the means to overcome poverty through learning. The campaign involves matched funding principles and is led by The Life You Can Save, a nonprofit dedicated to combating extreme poverty by linking contributors with impactful causes. This effort seeks to enhance educational opportunities for underprivileged girls in India, enabling them to break free from the cycle of poverty through access to quality education. The fundraising campaign is active in Seattle since February 27, 2025.

news.headline: Table Trac to pay $0.02 per share dividend to shareholders on March 28, 2025; record date is March 14, 2025.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, the Table Trac Inc. Board of Directors in Minnetonka, Minnesota, declared a cash dividend of $0.02 per share for shareholders of record as of March 14, 2025. The dividend will be paid on March 28, 2025. The company's common stock is listed as OTCQX: TBTC.

news.headline: L3Harris increases quarterly dividend from $1.16 to $1.20; payable March 21, 2025; annualized rate up from $4.64 to $4.80.
news.summary: In Melbourne, Fla., the Board of Directors of L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) has approved a rise in the per share quarterly cash dividend rate from $1.16 to $1.20. This increase will begin with the dividend for the first quarter of 2025, scheduled to be paid on March 21, 2025, to shareholders of record as of March 10, 2025. The adjusted dividend equates to an annualized rate spike from $4.64 to $4.80. This marks the 24th consecutive dividend rise by the company.

news.headline: Ukraine's PM after the Zelenskiy-Trump clash in the Oval Office: Zelenskiy is right, peace without guarantees is not possible.
NEA introduces Tower 28 Scholarship Fund to assist eczema patients and caregivers attending Eczema Expo.
news.summary: In Novato, California on February 28, 2025, the National Eczema Association (NEA) revealed the introduction of Expo Scholarships supported by the Tower 28 Scholarship Fund. These scholarships aim to facilitate the attendance of a larger number of individuals affected by eczema at the upcoming annual Eczema Expo. The event is scheduled to be held in Scottsdale.

news.headline: Mexico is open to new tariffs on China to avoid Trump duties.
'Post-election rally that boosted stocks amidst Trump's win has now faded. S&P 500 facing worst week of 2022.'
news.summary: Following President Trump’s victory, the stock market saw a significant increase; however, the upward trend came to a halt recently. The S&P 500, a key indicator of the market's performance, was facing a challenging week, with the potential to be the worst one so far this year. Investors witnessed a sharp rise in stocks initially after the President's win, but the current data indicates a slowdown in the market's momentum.

news.headline: Shiba Inu down 5%, price at $0.00001373, market cap of $8.09 billion. Analyst predicts support at $0.000012, $0.0000094.
news.summary: Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) is experiencing a significant correction, prompting traders to monitor for possible support levels and catalysts for a bullish reversal. Currently, Shiba Inu is priced at $0.00001373 with a market capitalization of $8.09 billion, showing a 5.7% decrease in the last 24 hours and a 10.5% decline over the past 7 days. Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) is valued at $0.1979 with a market cap of $29.3 billion, witnessing a 5.3% drop in the last 24 hours and a 19.8% decrease in the past week. Meanwhile, Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) is at $0.057911 with a market cap of $3.3 billion, reflecting a 5.6% downturn in 24 hours and a 15.8% decrease in the last 7 days. Renowned crypto analyst Ali Martinez anticipates Shiba Inu could potentially discover support at $0.000012 or $0.0000094, suggesting a possible opportunity for a rebound. #ShibaInu $SHIB might see a support level at $0.000012 or $0.0000094 according to Ali’s analysis. Shiba Inu's detailed analysis is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: GSD, LLC partners with DG Fuels to open sustainable aviation fuel plant in Nebraska, supporting bioeconomy.
news.summary: GSD, LLC, in collaboration with DG Fuels and Phelps County Development Corporation, is pleased to announce their joint effort on the Phelps County project in PHELPS COUNTY, Nebraska. On Feb. 28, 2025, DG Fuels revealed plans to inaugurate a sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) production facility as part of this initiative.

news.headline: Ferrovial CEO reflects on pivotal 2024, looks ahead to 2025 in a letter to employees and shareholders, Amsterdam, Feb. 28, 2025.
news.summary: Ferrovial, a prominent global infrastructure company, recently shared a letter from its CEO, Ignacio Madridejos, to employees and shareholders. In the letter, Madridejos reflects on the significance of the past year and outlines future plans up to 2025. The communication, released in Amsterdam on February 28, 2025, highlights the achievements of the company in 2024 and sets the stage for anticipated developments in the coming years.

news.headline: US consumer costs could rise due to tariffs per Fed paper; tariffs may impact everyday expenses.
Many altcoins to fail by 2025; only those with ETF approvals and revenue models will succeed.
news.summary: In 2025, it is projected that only alternative cryptocurrencies that secure ETF approvals and possess strong revenue-generating strategies will surpass the overall crypto market in terms of performance.

news.headline: LG&E and KU plan new generation and battery storage to meet energy needs of Kentucky's growth. Record economic growth benefits Kentuckians with job opportunities.
news.summary: The rapid economic advancement and expansion of data centers are increasing the demand for additional energy in Louisville, Kentucky. As of February 28, 2025, the state has experienced unparalleled economic growth, drawing global interest and creating numerous job openings for residents. This growth is enhancing the overall well-being of all individuals in Kentucky, with a surge in opportunities and an increase in the need for resources such as energy.

news.headline: DeliverHealth and Google Cloud join forces at HIMSS25 to revolutionize clinical documentation.
news.summary: A collaboration between DeliverHealth and Google Cloud is set to revolutionize healthcare clinical documentation methods, as announced on February 28, 2025 in Madison, Wisconsin. The partnership aims to enhance the process by which healthcare providers record patient care. This innovative approach will be showcased at HIMSS25 in Las Vegas from March 3 to 6. Attendees will have the opportunity to experience this transformation firsthand through interactive demonstrations and presentations. DeliverHealth, a key player in the field, is paving the way for advanced healthcare documentation technology, with HIMSS25 serving as a platform for showcasing their cutting-edge solutions.

news.headline: Taco Cabana launches new Shrimp Tacos for Lent on March 5, 2025. Limited time offer with battered shrimp, lettuce, tomato, and chipotle ranch in a fresh flour tortilla.
news.summary: Taco Cabana in San Antonio will introduce a new menu item for the Lent Season, starting from March 5, 2025. The limited-time addition of Shrimp Tacos will include battered shrimp, lettuce, tomato, and chipotle ranch in a fresh flour tortilla.

news.headline: North Shore Animal League America's 25th annual Tour For Life starts coast-to-coast road trip to promote animal rescue & adoption. #RescueRocks!
news.summary: North Shore Animal League America has kicked off its 25th annual Tour For Life®, the biggest collaborative pet adoption event globally, showcasing the life-saving efforts of shelter partners across the nation. The event, known as Rescue Rocks!, will run until mid-April. The organization aims to drive awareness and help pets find loving homes, with a focus on the staggering 25 years of successful campaigns.

news.headline: Canada's Foreign Minister Joly: Canada needs to be closer to Europe and the UK.
AS PRFoods' unaudited Q2 and 6-month financial report for 2024/2025 released with positive figures.
White House Official: Trump felt disrespected by Zelenskiy's rhetoric and demeanor.
Canada's Foreign Minister: We are in a security crisis.
SEC Commissioner Crenshaw disagrees with agency's stance on memecoins, citing vague definition that can lead to misinterpretation.
news.summary: Commissioner Caroline Crenshaw noted that the agency is working on refining its definition of memecoins due to its vague nature, which could lead to misinterpretation.

news.headline: Grand opening of Tropical Playground Oasis at International Plaza and Bay Street, inspired by Muma Children's Hospital at TGH. TAMPA, Fla., Feb. 28, 2025.
news.summary: TAMPA, Florida - International Plaza and Bay Street (IP) in collaboration with the Muma Children's Hospital at Tampa General Hospital (TGH) are set to unveil a new children's play area. The design of the play area mirrors that of the Muma Children's Hospital at TGH. The grand opening is scheduled for February 28, 2025. This initiative aims to provide a fun and engaging space for young patients and their families visiting the hospital.

news.headline: Senior White House Official: Press conference cancelled. It's up to Ukrainians if it can be rescheduled while Zelenskiy is still in the country.
Avirmax Biopharma begins IND studies of ABI-201 for Dry AMD gene therapy, a pioneering AAV treatment.
news.summary: In Hayward, California on February 28, 2025, Avirmax Biopharma, Inc. revealed the initiation of Investigational New Drug (IND) studies for ABI-201, an innovative AAV vector. This vector is set to be a frontrunner in AAV gene therapies, with a focus on potential first-in-class capabilities. The company is aiming to pave the way in this field by conducting rigorous research and development on ABI-201 for its efficient delivery system.

news.headline: Comerica Bank wins award for service to businesses, praised for focus on small and middle market clients by Coalition Greenwich.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, in Dallas, Comerica Bank was named a top bank by Crisil Coalition Greenwich for its exceptional support of small business and middle market customers. The Coalition Greenwich Awards are highly esteemed in the banking industry, evaluating banks on various criteria. Comerica Bank's recognition underscores its commitment to serving small businesses and middle market clients effectively.

news.headline: White House Official: Zelenskiy and Trump did not sign minerals deal on Friday.
Webstar Technology partners with Nelson Worldwide Architects for Bear Village Resort, Nelson ranked #9 on Building Design + Construction's Top 200 Architecture Firms for 2024.
news.summary: Webstar Technology Group (OTCQB: WBSR) based in Atlanta, announced on February 28, 2025, that Nelson Worldwide has been recognized as the 9th best architecture firm in the country for 2024 by Building Design + Construction. This prestigious ranking solidifies Nelson Worldwide's position among the top architects in the industry.

news.headline: Senior US Official: Trump not ruling out agreement with Zelenskiy, but not until Ukraine is ready to have a constructive conversation.
